name: cuda-keyring
title: cuda-keyring
summary: GPG keyring for the CUDA repository
description:
GPG keyring for the CUDA repository
Enrolls public key: 3BF863CC (2023)
and enables repo: debian12/x86_64
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cuda-keyring because GPG keyring for the CUDA repository.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cuda-keyring as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cuda-keyring with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cuda-keyring --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
